title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Life Insurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Life Insurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Life Insurance! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Life Insurance:
HDFC Life Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance!
